General.Name: Microware Group Ltd
General.Description: Microware Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides information technology (IT) infrastructure solutions and IT managed services in Hong Kong. The company procures semiconductor, hardware, and software products, including design of solutions services. It also offers maintenance, support, and management services, as well as implementation services of the IT infrastructure solutions. In addition, the company provides consultancy and advisory services. Microware Group Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
